index.heroParagraph: AI capital intelligence that scans 300+ value signals to accelerate enterprise growth.
index.engineLead: A multi-model diagnostic core scans 300+ value dimensions across strategy, finance, operations, and governance — in real time.
index.procLead: One standard, one tempo, one outcome — from full-spectrum intake to capital-path execution.
index.kpiLead: Enterprises served, industries covered, and value unlocked across the RVC network.

csStories.quote: The capital landscape is evolving faster than ever, and AI-grade diagnostics are essential to keep pace. RVC has transformed how we prepare for listing — enabling us to navigate complexity with precision, surface the value drivers that matter, and focus on execution rather than guesswork.
csStories.name: Dr. Claudia Junker

csStories.quote: We came in expecting a valuation report. We left with a 180-day execution map and a shortlist of advisors who actually understood our category. The diagnostic surfaced two governance gaps our auditors had missed for years.
csStories.name: Marcus Tanaka

csStories.quote: RVC's benchmarking gave our board the confidence to push the listing window forward by a full quarter. Every claim in the equity story was backed by a number we could defend in a room of skeptics.
csStories.name: Isabela Moreira

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Company Overview Analysis
items: Used-car sector TAM exceeded $180B in 2024; B2B/B2C dual-engine model has significant network effect potential.
50-person lean team generating $50M revenue places headcount efficiency in the top 25th industry percentile.
Recommend establishing a clear org chart soon to facilitate due diligence in future fundraising.

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Financial Health Insights
items: 38% YoY growth outpaces the industry median (22%); growth quality rated Excellent.
22% gross margin is mid-range for used-car platforms; SaaS-ization can lift gross margin to 40%+.
Customer concentration at 28% is below the 30% caution threshold, increasing fundraising appeal.

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Operational Efficiency Insights
items: 22-hour inspection delivery is industry-leading and a core differentiator.
28-day inventory turnover: reducing to 20 days could unlock ~$2M in working capital.
Significant room to improve standardization; SaaS-ization can push valuation multiples to 8–12× ARR.

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Strategic Positioning Insights
items: TAM $180B+, current penetration extremely low — strong narrative foundation for 10× growth story.
AI pricing + B2B SaaS dual engines are the high-premium path; recommend as the core capital narrative.
After-market service extension projected to triple or quadruple LTV — a key value multiplier.

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Governance Risk Alert
items: Insufficient independent directors is the single biggest IPO barrier — complete by Q3.
Switching to Big4 audit requires an 18-month lead time; plan accordingly for the IPO timeline.
Data security compliance (PIPL/GDPR) is a mandatory threshold for overseas fundraising.

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Technology Value Assessment
items: 800K+ inspection data assets form a competitive moat — establish a clear data monetization path.
B2B SaaS-ization can shift valuation logic from GMV-based to ARR-based with a 30–50% premium uplift.
Publishing a technology roadmap increases institutional investor trust — recommend organizing promptly.

aiInsights.title: ⚡ Capital Path Recommendations
items: US IPO target is well-founded; recommend completing Series B first then launching IPO prep in 2026.
$300–500M valuation target requires achieving $100M+ revenue and significant profit improvement within 2 years.
The RVC advisor network can match 3–5 top-tier USD funds focused on new economy sectors.

pathways.title: Series B + US IPO Preparation
pathways.desc: Complete Series B ($30–50M) then launch US IPO preparation, leveraging growth momentum to access overseas institutional markets.

pathways.title: Strategic M&A (Sell-side)
pathways.desc: Existing tech assets and B2B network offer strong M&A appeal to auto groups and internet platforms, with EV multiples of ~5–8× ARR.

pathways.title: HK IPO
pathways.desc: Hong Kong market valuations for auto aftermarket are recovering; suitable to initiate after domestic regulatory environment stabilizes.
pathways.timeline: Target: 36+ months · Governance improvements required first

risks.name: Data Security Compliance Gap (PIPL/GDPR)
risks.action: Mandatory threshold for overseas fundraising — initiate compliance program by Q2

ipo.timelineSub: Six-phase execution roadmap to capital markets
ipo.categorySub: 15 core preparation items across 5 key domains
ipo.checklistSub: Key milestones and admission requirements for public listing

checklistItems.name: Revenue Recognition Accounting Policy
checklistItems.sub: Revenue recognition rules documented and implemented

checklistItems.name: Corporate Charter Restructuring Complete
checklistItems.sub: Legal entity structure meets IPO requirements

checklistItems.name: Audit Committee Formation
checklistItems.sub: Requires at least 3 independent directors with audit background

checklistItems.name: PIPL Compliance & Data Security Framework
checklistItems.sub: Personal Information Protection Law compliance architecture

checklistItems.name: Prospectus (F-1) Drafting
checklistItems.sub: SEC registration filing preparation and legal review

ipo.riskSub: Critical risk factors to resolve before listing

riskCards.title: Big4 Audit Firm Not in Place
riskCards.desc: Public market investors require at least 2 full fiscal years of Big4 audit reports — the single biggest IPO blocker for this company. Engagement must begin immediately.

riskCards.title: Critically Insufficient Independent Directors
riskCards.desc: SEC / HKEX both require audit committees with a majority of independent directors. Current board composition does not meet regulatory requirements.

riskCards.title: PIPL Data Compliance Gaps
riskCards.desc: Platform has accumulated vehicle transaction user data; PIPL compliance architecture is not fully established and may trigger regulatory scrutiny.
riskCards.action: Launch dedicated data compliance remediation plan

riskCards.title: Revenue Growth Is Strong
riskCards.desc: 38% YoY growth significantly outperforms the used-car industry median (12%). B2B SaaS transition brings predictable recurring revenue, supporting premium valuation.
riskCards.action: Sustain growth momentum through the listing window

ipo.actionsSub: Key initiatives with highest impact on IPO readiness

actionCards.title: Engage Big4 Audit Firm
actionCards.desc: RVC will provide a warm introduction to a premier audit partner — the critical path for IPO. Recommend initiating this week.

actionCards.title: Independent Director Recruitment Plan
actionCards.desc: Identify and onboard 2 independent directors with listed-company experience, to be completed by November 2026 to satisfy regulatory requirements.

actionCards.title: Financial System Upgrade
actionCards.desc: Deploy enterprise financial management system (SAP / Oracle), establish complete audit trail, and meet internal control and SOX compliance requirements.
